# JavaNepal — Master OOPs With Java
> Curated Java OOP question bank for BITM 2nd Semester exam revision.

## About
JavaNepal provides 500+ Java OOP questions organised by 9 units and 77 topics, with detailed answers, code examples, and explanations. Built for personal study and exam revision based on the BITM 2nd Semester Java OOP syllabus.

## Navigation
- Home: https://javanepal.vercel.app/
- All Units: https://javanepal.vercel.app/units
- Search: https://javanepal.vercel.app/search
- Bookmarks: https://javanepal.vercel.app/bookmarks
- About: https://javanepal.vercel.app/about

## Important URLs
- Unit: Introduction to Java: https://javanepal.vercel.app/unit/introduction-to-java
- Unit: Fundamental Programming Structures: https://javanepal.vercel.app/unit/fundamental-programming-structures
- Unit: Classes and Objects: https://javanepal.vercel.app/unit/classes-and-objects
- Unit: Inheritance and Interfaces: https://javanepal.vercel.app/unit/inheritance-and-interfaces
- Unit: Exception Handling: https://javanepal.vercel.app/unit/exception-handling
- Unit: Generics and Collections: https://javanepal.vercel.app/unit/generics-and-collections
- Unit: Multithreaded Programming: https://javanepal.vercel.app/unit/multithreaded-programming
- Unit: Essential Java Classes: https://javanepal.vercel.app/unit/essential-java-classes
- Unit: File Handling: https://javanepal.vercel.app/unit/file-handling
